jobDescription: We are looking for a Strategic Finance Analyst to join our Finance team and work cross-functionally to support the demand side of our marketplace (including our Marketing and Trade departments). This role will be pivotal in allowing us to maximize our investments in two key, growth-driving areas of our growing business. Our Marketing department is diverse in its channel mix, and includes a large digital media budget, brand marketing, events, catalog, creative, and editorial. Our Trade department includes a team of sales, service, and procurement employees who work to encourage interior designers and architects (collectively referred to as the “trade”) to make purchases on the 1stdibs platform. Given the size of the teams and budgets involved, this is a high-profile and demanding role that requires independent and analytical thought. What you’ll do Guide Business Decisions Analyze efficiency of marketing spend across multiple channels, including paid media and promotional discounts Develop frameworks and key performance indicators to ensure we are scaling responsibly: both fueling high growth and making sound financial decisions Help gain alignment between interdependent teams within our increasingly complex business Review customer cohort performance of both consumer and Trade buyers Support our bi-annual strategic planning process by assessing the potential impact of new business opportunities Budgeting & Forecasting Work with the Finance Manager to build budgets and forecasts related to the Sales & Marketing organization, including top-line growth targets, headcount expense, and marketing spend Partner with sales and marketing team leadership and collaborate across departments to help manage marketing requests Act as a business partner to various stakeholders to understand their needs and provide an on-going financial point of view Maintain a comprehensive P& L for the Trade organization to provide a full view of its economics Reporting Collaborate with Finance team colleagues and business leaders to produce monthly and quarterly financial performance reviews for the Executive team Prepare materials for the Board of Directors and investors Aid in regular operational reporting of sales team effectiveness and marketing channel performance What you will bring3+ years of experience working in an FP& A role, Marketing or Sales -related work a major plus. Previous experience in e-commerce, investment banking, or consulting also a plus Bachelor’s degree, preferably with a finance or other business major Expert knowledge of Excel and Powerpoint Excellent analytical skills with the ability to go deep into the details, then compile key information for business stakeholders Capacity to work across departments and interact with employees who range from the junior level to the executive level Ability to state ideas clearly and concisely, and to be able to admit a mistake Comfort with ambiguity, and desire to improve processes and build business decision frameworks Familiarity with and passion for e-commerce, marketplaces, furniture, and design a plus Experience with Looker, Google Analytics, and/or SQL a plus
